text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
This red bean paste is super delish! It's like
I'm fully recharged of my Copa energy☆ 
Where did you buy this stuff, Acute?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you like it! I got it across the street 
from the greengrocer down the road.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Delicious!♪ This sweetness is recharging my Taru energy☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Is that locadol mode I hear?!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: It's time for a taruific Tomakomai introduction☆ …This might work.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh my, are you trying to imitate Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Rickeynese is surprisingly full of tips 
on how to sell a personality…

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: This taiyaki really is a-cutie♪ …Hehe, well I admit this is quite fun.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hokko☆ hocky☆ Hokkaido!☆ 
Hmm… perhaps it could use a bit 
more workshopping.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well… it wasn't a bad start. I'll let you take it. 
Rickey☆ lucky☆ fine by meee☆
